---
title: "about_page_3"
author: "Edward"
date: "2024-04-02"
output: html_document
---

The **_NR Mal App_** incorporates data from various sources in Ghana and this includes:
1. [National Malaria Elimination Program](https://ghs.gov.gh/national-malaria-elimination-program-nmep/).  
2. [Ghana Meteorological Agency](https://www.meteo.gov.gh/gmet/).  
3. [Ghana Open Data Initiative](https://data.gov.gh/dataset/shapefiles-all-regions-ghana-2010-10-regions).
